title: Median over temporal domains
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE voyages (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, departure_date DATE NOT NULL, destination VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO voyages (departure_date, destination) VALUES (DATE '1770-01-01', 'London'), (DATE '1770-02-01', 'Paris'), (DATE '1770-03-01', 'New York');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voyages WHERE departure_date IS NULL;
SELECT departure_date FROM voyages ORDER BY departure_date OFFSET (SELECT COUNT(*) / 2 FROM voyages) ROWS FETCH NEXT 1 ROWS ONLY;
